title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 5 - Communicating (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course that includes a chapter on artificial intelligence and communicating with AI systems. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, with this specific session taught by Brian Yu focusing on communication topics.
writeup: This CS50 session is Chapter 5 of Harvard's introductory artificial intelligence course, presented live and unedited with Brian Yu and focused on communicating AI concepts. As part of Harvard's introductory computer science and AI curriculum led by David J. Malan, it situates the material within a structured educational sequence. The course is distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, with associated community discussion channels for learners.
